scripts.pack:local: rm -rf dist/packages && mkdir -p dist/packages && pnpm --filter @zenbujs/core build && pnpm -C packages/core pack --pack-destination ../../dist/packages && pnpm --filter @zenbujs/cli build && pnpm -C packages/zen pack --pack-destination ../../dist/packages
scripts.ci: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm run check:ts-ignores
